title: Regions Unexplored Biome Book Compat
description: This mod adds the regions unexplored biomes to the biome book mod.
body:
### This mod adds compatibility between [Regions Unexplored](https://modrinth.com/mod/regions-unexplored) and [Biome Book](https://modrinth.com/mod/biome-book)
### 
![Example image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/c3yBaUNy/images/6b2d396c886a1f7e4f72b6700223d981101580c7.png)
